body:
## Summary
- rewrites the q146-derived political-rights true/false prompts as complete SV/EN propositions instead of answer fragments
- mirrors the generator logic in `scripts/validate-content.js`
- regenerates canonical CSV and static question-bank output, with focused regression tests for the q146 generated rows

## Validation
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern 'political-rights generated true/false exports use complete propositions' tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern 'q146 political-rights' scripts/derived-content.test.js`
- direct CSV/static scan for q761/q762 required and forbidden text

Note: I initially ran `tests/content-published-question-types.test.js` with the filter after the file path, which executed the whole known-red mutation fixture file. The target political-rights test passed there and passed again with the filter placed correctly before the file path.
title: [codex] Rewrite political-rights generated true/false prompts
